content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K016
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H2 2024 (July – December 2024)
Meeting Date: January 14, 2025
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Darius Moore (Regional Manager West), Marcus Lee (Distribution Center Manager)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Harmon Retail closed 2024 with 27 company-owned stores and 10 franchise locations, ahead of their 12-franchise target by end of 2025. Q4 2024 was another strong holiday quarter. Sandra Harmon shared they are exploring a second distribution center opening in 2025.

PLATFORM USAGE
65 licensed users active following the November 2024 renewal expansion. Weekly active rate is 94% — the highest since launch. Mobile usage remains dominant at 71% of activity. The guest link workaround for franchise partners has been deployed to 6 franchise locations with mixed results — franchise managers find the link expiry workflow confusing.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Guest link workaround for franchise access is not scaling well — Sandra Harmon expressed frustration that 4 of 10 franchise locations are not using it consistently due to the link expiry issue
- James Okafor escalated the franchise read-only tier request to the product team with a formal business case in October 2024 — response was that it is under consideration for the 2026 roadmap
- Second distribution center expansion would add an estimated 15-20 users — James Okafor to include in 2025 renewal planning
- Sandra Harmon confirmed she has referred DataSync Pro to two peer COOs in the retail industry

SATISFACTION RATING: 4/5
Sandra Harmon: "We're happy with the core platform. The franchise situation is a growing frustration. I need a real solution, not a workaround."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to provide a 2026 roadmap update on franchise read-only tier by February 2025
- Second distribution center expansion proposal to be prepared for Q3 2025 planning
- Follow up on two referral introductions Sandra Harmon mentioned

NEXT QBR: July 2025
